# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2021-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[parameters('appServicePlan')]",
        "httpsOnly": true
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "config",
          "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
          "name": "appsettings",
          "properties": {
            "AzureWebJobsStorage": "[parameters('azureWebJobsStorage')]",
            "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION": "~3",
            "WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION": "14.17.0"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'Storage_Data_Contributor')]",

        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]",

      }
    },

    },

    }
  ],
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Function App"

    },
    "appServicePlan": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The App Service Plan for the Function App"

      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The connection string for Azure WebJobs storage account"
